violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hood filters above the grill noted not clean.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in dry food storage area walkin cooler and walkin freezer
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single use sandwich bags and straws noted being stored on the floor.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Metal ceiling vent covers in the establishment noted rusted not easily cleanable.
